classes.label: Organization
classes.description: A top-level legal business entity that encompasses departments, employees, and projects.

classes.label: Department
classes.description: A functional subdivision within an organization, responsible for a specific business area.

classes.label: Employee
classes.description: An individual employed by an organization, assigned roles and participating in projects.

classes.label: Project
classes.description: A time-bound initiative with defined objectives, deliverables, and lifecycle stages.

classes.label: Role
classes.description: A named set of responsibilities assigned to employees within the organization.

properties.label: has department
properties.description: Links an organization to its constituent departments.

properties.label: employed by
properties.description: Links an employee to the organization they work for.

properties.label: has role
properties.description: Assigns a role to an employee.

properties.label: contributes to
properties.description: Links an employee to a project they participate in.
